title: U.S. and Iran trade fire in Strait of Hormuz; each claims other shot first
summary_full: CENTCOM's statement does not mention the status of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, which has already been frayed by repeated claims that its terms are being breached.
summary_public: CENTCOM's statement does not mention the status of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, which has already been frayed by repeated claims that its terms are being breached.
